examples: It now appears a safe bet that vehicle will be named XE.
The new features in RAD Studio XE highlighted in this preview include the following.
Several other reactors and rocket designs were tested, most successfully the Phoebus and XE-Prime.
In February, defense contractor Blackwater Worldwide changed its name to the neutral-sounding Xe (pronounced "Zee").
In 2009 Blackwater announced that it was changing its name to Xe Holdings, LLC.
